subject: [PATCH v5 8/9] mm: memory: flatten alloc_anon_folio() retry loop

2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch simplifies the alloc_anon_folio() function by flattening its retry loop to improve code readability and maintainability. The original top-level if statement was buried four levels deep, making it difficult to understand and modify. By moving the success path to a more visible location, the code becomes cleaner and easier to work with. This change is made in preparation for additional code that will be added in the next patch.
